title: safishamsi/graphify
friendlyTitle: Graphify maps a project for AI helpers
summary: Graphify turns codebases, schemas, documents, papers, images, audio, and video into a queryable knowledge graph for AI coding assistants. It supports many agent environments, including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Hermes.
friendlySummary: Graphify turns a folder of code and documents into a knowledge graph that AI coding tools can search.
whyItMatters: Teams can use it to map a project once, then let agents query architecture, dependencies, and concepts without repeatedly scanning the whole repository. That can improve onboarding, code navigation, and multi-agent development workflows.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it when an AI assistant needs to understand a large project faster and with less repeated digging.
